steps.title: Find the connection between their march roles
steps.content: The strongest clue is that Hedgeman worked behind the scenes to ensure a woman speaker was included, and Bates was that woman who spoke. The comparison should show how these two contributions relate to each other.

steps.title: Match the connection to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly pairs these roles: “Although Hedgeman worked behind the scenes to make sure a woman speaker was included, Bates was the sole woman to speak at the march.” This shows how one role enabled the other—Hedgeman's backstage work and Bates's visible platform.

The other choices either provide general background unrelated to the march (B), mention Bates's speech without explaining Hedgeman's role (A), or treat them as similar examples among many women (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
